chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-393 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A No.2608/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection (s) 3. For orders on M.A No.2609/2026 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 01.04.2026 Mr.Irfan Ali Rahujo, Advocate for applicant ******* 1. Urgency granted. 2. Objection(s) Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicant Muhammad Yaseen @ Yaseen Burfat son of Muhammad Ishaque seeks protective bail in FIR No.507 of 2024 registered at P.S Kotri District Jamshoro for offences under Sections 395, 215 PPC. Learned Counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicant due to malafide intentions; that the applicant being law abiding citizen wish to face trial; however, he apprehends that before reaching trial Court he might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced; therefore seeks legal protection Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail till 06.04.2026, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 06.04.2026 or when the applicant surrenders himself before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
